testcase.system-out:
==========In on execution start============== Execution type is: Web_UI @Before class @Data provider +++++++++++++++++++++onTestStart++++++++++++++++++++ Execution started @ chromium browser & for type : Web UI
@WelcomeSeries_PushBasic Scenario: TC_001 Verify Welcome Series campaign using Push node # src/test/java/com/xnotify/bdd/web/features/CampaignBuilder.feature:13 +++++++++++++++++++before hooks++++++++++++++++++ Execution started @ chromium browser & for type : Web UI Default window size: 1280 * 720 Actual URL - https://cenomi-xnotify-uat.thankfultree-83cac082.westeurope.azurecontainerapps.io/login Expected URL - https://cenomi-xnotify-uat.thankfultree-83cac082.westeurope.azurecontainerapps.io/login Given user navigates to login page # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.LoginSteps.userNavigatesToLoginPage() Successfully entered value - cenomyOne@gmail.com in Username Textbox box When user enters username # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.LoginSteps.userEntersUsername() Successfully entered value - Admin@123 in Password Textbox box And user enters password # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.LoginSteps.userEntersPassword() Successfully clicked on - Login Button And user clicks on login button # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.LoginSteps.userClicksOnLoginButton() Text is - Notifi Then user should be redirected to dashboard page # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.LoginSteps.userShouldBeRedirectedToDashboardPage() Text is - Notifi And dashboard page should be displayed successfully # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.LoginSteps.dashboardPageShouldBeDisplayedSuccessfully() Successfully clicked on - Messaging Menu Successfully clicked on - Campaign Builder When user navigates to Campaign Builder module # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.navigateCampaignBuilder() Successfully clicked on - Create Campaign When user clicks create campaign button # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.clickCreateCampaign() Successfully entered value - Automation Campaign 1 in Campaign Name box And user enters campaign name as "Automation Campaign 1" # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.enterCampaignName(java.lang.String) Successfully entered value - This is a test campaign created using automation in Campaign Description box And user enters campaign description as "This is a test campaign created using automation" # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.enterCampaignDescription(java.lang.String) Successfully clicked on - Campaign Type Dropdown Total options: 5 Text: Welcome Series And user selects campaign type as "Welcome Series" # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.selectCampaignType(java.lang.String) Successfully clicked on - Campaign Goal Dropdown Total options: 4 Text: Engagement And user selects campaign goal as "Engagement" # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.selectCampaignGoal(java.lang.String) Successfully clicked on - Segment User Button Successfully clicked on - Target Audience Dropdown Total options: 12 Text: All Contacts Text: All Users And user selects audience as "Segment" and target audience as "All Users" # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.selectAudience(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Successfully clicked on - Visual Flow Builder Tab And user clicks visual flow buildert tab # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.clickVisualFlowBuilder() Successfully clicked on - Add Note button Successfully clicked on - Push Node And user adds "Push" node in visual flow # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.addNode(java.lang.String) Successfully clicked on - Schedule tab And user clicks schedule tab # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.clickScheduleTab() Successfully clicked on - Schedule Dropdown Total options: 5 Text: Send Immediately And user configures "Send Immediately" schedule type # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.configureSchedule(java.lang.String) Successfully clicked on - Save & Publish And user clicks save and publish button # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.saveAndPublish() Then campaign should be created successfully # com.xnotify.bdd.web.step_definitions.CampaignBuilderSteps.verifyCampaignCreated() com.microsoft.playwright.TimeoutError: Error { message='Timeout 10000ms exceeded. name='TimeoutError stack='TimeoutError: Timeout 10000ms exceeded. at ProgressController.run (C:\Users\TECQNIO\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-5046639151282186976\package\lib\server\progress.js:87:26) at Frame.waitForSelector (C:\Users\TECQNIO\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-5046639151282186976\package\lib\server\frames.js:619:23) at FrameDispatcher.waitForSelector (C:\Users\TECQNIO\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-5046639151282186976\package\lib\server\dispatchers\frameDispatcher.js:106:103) at FrameDispatcher._handleCommand (C:\Users\TECQNIO\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-5046639151282186976\package\lib\server\dispatchers\dispatcher.js:94:40) at DispatcherConnection.dispatch (C:\Users\TECQNIO\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-5046639151282186976\package\lib\server\dispatchers\dispatcher.js:362:39) } Call log: - waiting for locator("//div[contains(text(),'successfully')]") to be visible
